title: Vibrant Background
description: A resourcepack that replaces the menu background with one with the Vibrant Visuals.
body:
Vibrant Background
-
Vibrant Background is a resourcepack that changes the background, to the Vibrant Visual Shaders style to make your menu more **Vibrant**, **Better**, and **Cool**! (The Resourcepack only for and 1.21x). It will never have support for 1.20.x. or older versions.
-
![banner](https://imgur.com/a/ZNGiYaU)

Credits
-
Shader used for 1.21 - 1.21.3 versions: [Visual Vibrance](https://modrinth.com/shader/visual-vibrance) by [jbritain](https://modrinth.com/user/jbritain)![v1.0](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e430e02fde6ff9ea32ea3b7469762b9f8dcf1d41_0.webp)
